response.justification: Bogdan has extensive fullstack experience with TypeScript, React, Node.js, and PostgreSQL-adjacent tools, plus strong architecture and DevOps exposure, but his seniority level (Staff/Senior roles since 2014) far exceeds the junior/mid-level requirement, and his German language proficiency is only basic despite high on-site presence in Berlin being required.
strengths: Strong TypeScript and fullstack experience with React and Node.js
Proven track record in scalable architecture and DevOps (Docker, Kubernetes, AWS)
Active open-source contributions and technical teaching experience
concerns: Overqualified with 10+ years of senior/staff experience for junior/mid role
Basic German proficiency conflicts with high on-site requirement in Berlin
Focus on niche languages (DLang) and AI-agent tools may distract from core platform needs
